is.one_liner: Sovereign read-side inventory aggregator — joins sonar holdings with owned metadata + a completeness envelope
scope: Resolve holder inventory + NFT metadata for registered collections (Mibera first)
Attach an ACVP completeness envelope: provably complete as of block N
Resolve a wallet's profile picture from owned NFT artwork (Issue #87)

is_not: Does NOT manage minting, burning, or transfer initiation
Does NOT proxy chain RPC — consumes sonar-api for indexed reads
Will NOT own metadata — that is the codex / storage-api

acvp_invariants.scope: Holdings responses carry {as_of_block, holder_count, source, complete} from sonar; degraded when upstream unreachable

_comment: Library stage. Live counts + ACVP envelope wired to belt-gateway; per-token ownership (getNftsForOwner/getProfilePicture rich path) + MCP/HTTP deployment pending the sonar owner-token index (docs/sonar-ownership-gap.md). composes_with omitted pending port-schema sealing (ADR-007 App A.2 / ADR-008 §D-11) — consumes sonar-api + storage-api per README.
